class.name: E3DModelTool
class.brief_description: Utility singleton for derived E3D model data.
class.description: [E3DModelTool] provides helper methods for inspecting [E3DModel] resources. It can find the first mesh stored in a model hierarchy and compute an axis-aligned bounding box for the full model.

method.name: find_first_mesh
method.description: Returns the first mesh found in the E3D submodel hierarchy, or [code]null[/code] if the model has no meshes.

method.name: get_aabb
method.description: Computes and returns the combined axis-aligned bounding box for the whole E3D model.
